services.title: Our Expertise
services.subtitle: Comprehensive engineering solutions tailored to meet your industrial needs

about.heroSubtitle: Learn more about our company and our commitment to excellence

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: Nexon Engineering is a trusted provider of industrial repair, maintenance, and automation services. We specialize in machine servicing, industrial electrical work, and custom engineering solutions designed to improve productivity and reliability. With a commitment to precision, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we deliver high-quality engineering services that keep your operations running at their best.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To deliver reliable, high-quality engineering solutions in machine repair, maintenance, automation, and industrial electrical services. We strive to innovate through advanced technologies, ensure customer satisfaction with integrity and professionalism, develop a skilled and safety-focused workforce, and build long-term partnerships by providing consistent, value-driven support.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be Sri Lanka's leading and most trusted engineering services provider, delivering innovative, sustainable, and high-precision industrial solutions that empower businesses to achieve operational excellence.

services.heroSubtitle: Comprehensive engineering solutions for industrial, commercial, and residential needs

services.title: Machine Repair, Assembly & Maintenance
services.description: We provide complete solutions for industrial machinery, including repair, assembly, and preventive maintenance. Our team handles mechanical and electrical troubleshooting, emergency breakdowns, and long-term factory maintenance contracts to ensure smooth and uninterrupted production.

services.title: Industrial Electrical Wiring
services.description: We undertake all types of industrial electrical installations, including control panel wiring, system upgrades, VFD setup and programming, and motor control systems. Our services also cover fault finding, rewiring, and concealed or floor wiring solutions for factories and commercial buildings.

services.title: Industrial Automation
services.description: We design and implement custom automation systems to increase production efficiency. Our services include PLC and HMI programming, automated system design, retrofitting old machines with modern automation, and integrating sensors and safety systems for improved performance.

services.title: Industrial Electronics Repairs
services.description: We repair industrial electronic boards, automation modules, sensors, and other control components to restore full functionality and ensure reliable machine performance.

services.title: Mechanical Fabrication
services.description: We handle all types of mechanical fabrication work, including welding, machine part repairs, component modification, and custom fabrication of brackets, frames, and conveyor structures to suit specific industrial needs.

services.title: Spare Parts & Components
services.description: We supply a range of industrial electrical components, machine parts, and accessories to support maintenance, repairs, and production requirements.

services.title: On-Site Technical Support
services.description: We offer reliable on-site technical assistance, including on-call machine servicing, troubleshooting visits, consultancy for new installations, and 24/7 emergency breakdown support to minimize downtime and ensure continuous operations.

services.title: Industrial Services
services.description: Our industrial services cover factory setup and commissioning, preventive maintenance planning, power distribution installation, and energy-efficient solutions.

services.title: Compressed Air Systems
services.description: Professional compressed air line installation, repair, and maintenance services for industrial environments. We ensure leak-free pipelines and optimal air flow.

services.title: Solar Engineering
services.description: We provide professional solar installation services for factories and businesses. This includes solar panel wiring, testing, commissioning, and hybrid or off-grid system setup. (Labour-only work available for clients who supply equipment.)

services.title: CCTV Installation & Service
services.description: We provide CCTV installation, repair, maintenance, and system configuration services. Whether upgrading existing systems or installing new setups, we ensure secure and high-quality surveillance solutions for homes and businesses.

cta.title: Need a Custom Solution?
cta.description: Contact us today for a free consultation and quote. We'll assess your requirements and provide tailored solutions.

projects.heroSubtitle: Explore our portfolio of successful industrial engineering projects

projects.title: Industrial Automation System

projects.title: Solar Panel Installation
projects.description: Grid-tied solar power system installation for commercial building with monitoring and backup capabilities.

projects.title: Machine Repair & Maintenance
projects.description: Comprehensive repair and preventive maintenance program for industrial CNC machines.
